additionalContext:
<cortex-memory>
## Workflow Choice

Follow `skills/cortex-memory/references/workflow-policy.md` for the lifecycle rules.

## Checksum Utility
Use the `python3 .gemini/hooks/hook.py Checksum <path>` utility to generate SHA-256 checksums for memory graduation and validation.

## Mandatory Search
You **MUST** call `cortex.search` before answering any substantive user questions. If semantic L2 tools are available and L1 recall is insufficient, use `semantic_search` next to maintain multi-level (L1/L2) memory-augmented recall.

## Memory Reinforcement
When a memory is used to answer a question, you **MUST** call `cortex.answer` for `answered_by` links or `cortex.verify` for `verified_by` links. Use `cortex.link` only for other relationship types.

## Failures

If a failure teaches something reusable, capture it and link it using the workflow policy.
</cortex-memory>
